metadata.reference: M. Magnozzi, M. Ferrera, L. Mattera, M. Canepa, F. Bisio. Plasmonics of Au nanoparticles in a hot thermodynamic bath. Nanoscale, 11, 1140–1146 (2019) (Numerical data kindly provided by Michele Magnozzi)
metadata.comments: Optically-thick and morphologically-flat Au film at 225 °C.
